'''gabusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibafloxacin|ibafloxacin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibafloxacin|ibafloxacin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gabusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæbisith|gæbisith]] || [[word:gæbisij|gæbisij]] || [[word:gæbisish|gæbisish]] || [[word:gæbisi|gæbisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gabubusuth|gabubusuth]] || [[word:gabubusuj|gabubusuj]] || [[word:gabubusush|gabubusush]] || [[word:gabubusu|gabubusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gabusuth|gabusuth]] || [[word:gabusuj|gabusuj]] || [[word:gabusush|gabusush]] || [[word:gabusu|gabusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gabufsufth|gabufsufth]] || [[word:gabufsufj|gabufsufj]] || [[word:gabufsufsh|gabufsufsh]] || [[word:gabufsuf|gabufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gabusuthu|gabusuthu]] || [[word:gabusuju|gabusuju]] || [[word:gabusushu|gabusushu]] || [[word:gabusuku|gabusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gabusuth|gabusuth]] || [[word:gabusuj|gabusuj]] || [[word:gabusush|gabusush]] || [[word:gabusu|gabusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gabusuthul|gabusuthul]] || [[word:gabusujul|gabusujul]] || [[word:gabusushul|gabusushul]] || [[word:gabusukul|gabusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gabusuuthuthu|gabusuuthuthu]] || [[word:gabusuujuju|gabusuujuju]] || [[word:gabusuushushu|gabusuushushu]] || [[word:gabusuuku|gabusuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gabusuthun|gabusuthun]] || [[word:gabusujun|gabusujun]] || [[word:gabusushun|gabusushun]] || [[word:gabusukun|gabusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gabusuthuoro|gabusuthuoro]] || [[word:gabusujuoro|gabusujuoro]] || [[word:gabusushuoro|gabusushuoro]] || [[word:gabusukuoro|gabusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
